#  View Published Budget History for a Project in Portfolio Financials 
#####  Legacy
This information is intended for accounts with the [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) and [Capital Planning](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-capital-planning) products in Procore. Please reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Background 
The Budget tab within the Cost Tracker allows you to build project budgets with variances and anticipated costs. There are two different budgeting methods that you can use in Portfolio Financials: a _broken down budget_ , which will allow you to assign budgets to individual cost items through the Cost Tracker, and an _overall (lump sum) budget_ , where you have one amount for the entire project. Budgets must be published in order to show on the Cost Tracker and the Published Budget History window.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Full Access' to the project or higher.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Cost Tracker** section of the **Project Page**.
  2. Click the **Budget** tab.
  3. Click the **vertical ellipsis** ![Icon Ellipsis Vertical](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b6d0fa56ca6a66941a4032499f56aec8/2bb6315cb1db00c907bda1e2ae7a081c/icon-vertical-ellipsis.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon and select **View Published Budget History**.  
  
![View Published Budget History](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/264398f5dae883aab9f8191db9329306/d3017832891ba4a4e96b7fc932873b18/view-published-budget-history.png?fm=webp)  

  4. The Published Budget History window lists all published revisions of the project's budget, along with the total amounts and dates they were published.
  5. When you are finished reviewing the published budget history, click **Close**.


## See Also
  * [View the Budget for a Project in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/view-the-budget-for-a-project-in-portfolio-financials)
  * [Portfolio Financials - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/permissions)
  * [View a Cash Flow Forecast in Portfolio Financials and Capital Planning](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/view-a-cash-flow-forecast-in-portfolio-financials-and-capital-planning)
title: View Published Budget History for a Project in Portfolio Financials
description: How to view a history of published budgets for a project in Portfolio Financials.
